jobs.description: Our internship opportunities are your steppingstone to a career a Deutsche Bank. You’ll receive formal training, and you’ll quickly gain the confidence to take on real projects. You’ll feel supported by colleagues from across our business and start to develop your own professional network. We offer our Internship Programme across various business divisions and infrastructure areas. To be eligible for our internship you must be in your penultimate year of study. more

jobs.title: Student Programs & Internship Programs
Summer Internships – London
jobs.description: Stifel’s Summer Internship Program introduces participants to the financial industry through practical experience. The program aims to provide an understanding of industry operations and corporate practices. Summer internships are available within the following divisions in London: Corporate Finance, Equity Capital Markets, Equities Research, and Equities Sales. In London, the internship duration is six to eight weeks during the summer. Applicants must have completed their penultimate year of un

jobs.title: Off-Cycle Internships – Continental Europe & London
jobs.description: Across Paris, Munich, Frankfurt, Stockholm, and London, Off-cycle Internships are offered for up to six months within the Investment Banking division. Candidates for Off-cycle Internships should have graduated or completed undergraduate studies prior to the internship start date or be MBA students. Previous relevant internship experience is typically expected.

jobs.title: Graduate Analyst Programs
jobs.description: The Graduate Analyst Program at Stifel is designed for students in the final year of an undergraduate or master’s degree seeking roles in international investment banking. Graduate positions are available within the following divisions in London: Corporate Finance, Equity Capital Markets, Equities Research, and Equities Sales. The Graduate Analyst Program consists of an initial comprehensive training program consisting of both technical and professional skills content, designed to equip new anal

jobs.title: 60+ global offices
jobs.description: Piper Sandler has more than 60 offices across the United States as well as international offices in London, Aberdeen, Zurich, Munich and Hong Kong. We're headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota, and pride ourselves on being a Wall Street bank with midwest values.

jobs.title: Veterans Network
jobs.description: The Veterans Network supports former military personnel within and beyond Piper Sandler. This group serves as an internal resource for community engagement, training, events and recruiting initiatives, as well as to assist veterans in their transition to the corporate workforce.

jobs.title: Our internships and various student programs are not just a training ground but the start of your career path.
jobs.description: We offer a wide range of programs across all of our business lines and support areas throughout the United States and abroad.

jobs.title: Internships
jobs.description: Piper Sandler internships are designed to fortify your knowledge and capabilities with technical training and hands-on experience. Your career possibilities are endless with a foundation built in partnership with Piper Sandler.

jobs.title: Early Careers
jobs.description: Image Early Careers Explore the various early careers opportunities in our Aberdeen and London offices, including our summer analyst programme, invaluable spring week and student placement opportunities. We are fully invested in our future pipeline of talent. Aberdeen London

jobs.description: t program. On my second month on the job, we had a sell-side healthcare services M&A transaction going through diligence. jobs.title: Growth, Development & Personal Success
jobs.description: Lincoln International provides in-depth training in an apprenticeship model to ensure successful assimilation to the firm and to our approach to client service and high-quality, value-add deliverables. Lincoln is a recognized best place to work and our culture consistently receives high rankings from employees in our annual employee engagement survey. We support our employees with competitive benefits that provide the health and financial wellness tools necessary for them to succeed personally.

jobs.title: Abe Day:
jobs.description: Lincoln International celebrates our shared sense of giving annually during April in honor of the firm’s founding in April 1996. Lincoln’s global employees channel their efforts to support area causes through giving activities affectionately referred to as Abe Day in recognition of the firm’s namesake, U.S. President Abraham Lincoln. As part of Abe Day, Lincoln partners with Charity Miles, a platform that tracks movement and earns funds for charity. Each mile completed during Abe Day earns a cha

jobs.title: Elevating Women in Finance
jobs.description: Uniting, empowering and uplifting women is incredibly important at Lincoln International. Programs for Candidates & Finance Professionals Lincoln holds a variety of events globally to connect successful women and provide opportunities for advancement and development. Women in Finance: Each year, Lincoln holds a U.S. mentorship event for college sophomores to form relationships with fellow women and learn about careers in investment banking. Nordics Women in Banking Breakfast: Lincoln Internation

jobs.title: Nordics Women in Banking Breakfast:
jobs.description: Lincoln International’s Stockholm office hosts an annual breakfast to foster valuable connections and discuss career opportunities in investment banking in the Nordics.

jobs.title: Frankfurt Roundtable Discussion:
jobs.description: Lincoln International’s team in Frankfurt hosts a roundtable discussion for women in finance to discuss their careers, the challenges they face and ideas on how to work toward continued advancement for women.

jobs.title: Celebrating & Honoring Colleagues
jobs.description: Through a variety of programs throughout the year, Lincoln celebrates and learns about the diverse backgrounds and valuable contributions made by our fellow colleagues and potential talent. Women’s History Month: In honor of Women’s History Month and International Women’s Day, Lincoln International offices across the world celebrate and show appreciation to our dynamic, trailblazing women employees who make an immeasurable impact in every corner of the organization.
